title: Cryptool goes live on Ethereum
content_html:
Cryptool is now live on Ethereum.

The same automated fundraising stack that launched on BNB Chain a month ago is now available to Ethereum projects and investors, with native support for ETH, USDT and USDC.

What works end to end on Ethereum from today:

  • Automated fundraising from pool open to final distribution
  • Syndicate management with no spreadsheets
  • Launchpads stood up in seconds
  • One-click raise pool deployment

OTC market, portfolio and asset management, and co-investing follow on Ethereum next.

With ETH and BNB both live, Cryptool now covers the two largest EVM ecosystems for Web3 fundraising. For investors, that means one platform, two of the deepest liquidity pools in crypto.
author: Cryptool
